message.content:
The Houston area offers multiple **nonsurgical treatments to reduce wrinkles**, including injectables, laser treatments, radiofrequency procedures, and microneedling.

## Injectable Treatments

**Botox and dermal fillers** are foundational options for wrinkle reduction[7]. Botox addresses dynamic wrinkles caused by facial movements, while dermal fillers like **Restylane Lyft** restore facial volume and reduce the appearance of fine lines and deep creases[6]. These injectables can be combined as part of a "liquid facelift" to achieve lifting and contouring effects similar to surgical facelifts[7]. Results from fillers typically last 9–18 months[9].

## Radiofrequency and Microneedling

**INFINI RF microneedling** combines radiofrequency heat with microneedling to stimulate collagen production and reduce wrinkles on the face and neck[1]. **Profound®** is another radiofrequency-microneedling hybrid that addresses fine lines, skin imperfections, and sagging with minimal downtime[2]. **ThermiSmooth**, a radiofrequency treatment, specifically targets lax skin on the eyelids, around the mouth, and cheeks, requiring three treatments spaced three weeks apart for optimal results[6].

## Ultrasound and Laser Treatments

**Ultherapy** is the only FDA-approved non-invasive treatment using microfocused ultrasound energy to lift and tighten skin on the face, neck, and décolletage by stimulating collagen production[5]. **Laser skin resurfacing**, such as IPL treatments, removes damaged skin layers one at a time to reduce wrinkles, lines, and sun damage[3]. **Microneedling** and microdermabrasion also improve skin texture by stimulating collagen production and exfoliating damaged cells[3].

## Treatment Duration and Results

Most nonsurgical procedures require minimal to no downtime[4][5]. Collagen stimulation from microneedling or laser treatments can improve skin quality for up to a year or more[9]. Board-certified plastic surgeons and dermatologists in Houston can customize treatment plans combining multiple procedures based on your specific aging concerns and desired results[3].
